scenario_goal: Ask GRC Agent to remove the detached unused variable block named unused_var from the copied graph.
allowed_user_behavior: Ask naturally to remove the detached unused_var block.
Mention that the graph copy should be validated after removal.
forbidden_user_behavior: Do not mention internal tool names, JSON, schemas, or judge expectations.
Do not ask to edit raw YAML.
Do not ask to save or load.
